texto: If you can avoid a fight, do it. But if you can't, then find your opponent's most vulnerable spot and hit them here hard, fast, and often. The worst thing you can do is let a fight escalate. Shut it down as soon as you can. And remember, there is no such thing as fighting dirty. You either kick their ass, or have yours handed to you.
explicacao: Citação de Kirker Butler sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If you can avoid a fight, do it. But if you can't, then find your opponent's most vulnerable spot…” articula reflexao, sage-advice, fight em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
